objective: Test DP4 + expert parallel + EP weight filtering on 4x B70 as a possible path beyond the TP4 quality-cleared baseline.

reference_quality_cleared_tp4.notes: No speculation, no expert dropping, Q/K TP variance allreduce enabled.

patches.name: xpu_worker CCL local-rank env patch
patches.reason: Allows local DP/EP oneCCL ranks to initialize correctly under vLLM XPU multiprocess serving.

patches.name: moe_wna16 safe-id masking for EP llm-scaler path
patches.reason: The llm-scaler tiny kernels already handle negative expert ids, and the tiny smoke was slower with safe-id masking.

runs.name: dp4_ep_eager_no_scaler_fit64_p16n8
runs.interpretation: Stability proof only; DP4+EP can initialize and generate after the CCL local-rank patch.

runs.name: dp4_ep_eager_scaler_safeids_fit64_p16n8
runs.interpretation: Stability proof only; safe-id masking appears slower and is not promoted.

runs.name: dp4_ep_compiled_scaler_safeids_p64n128_noautotune
runs.failure: XPU out of memory during Inductor autotuning/compile block
runs.interpretation: Compiled DP4+EP is memory blocked on 32GB B70s in the current runtime shape.

localmaxxing.reason: Only tiny smoke/stability data and a failed compiled run; no meaningful shareable throughput result.

next: Treat safe-id masking as diagnostic and likely revert for performance unless correctness requires it.
Return primary performance work to TP4 collective-boundary fusion and low-overhead timing.
Revisit DP4+EP only if runtime memory can be reduced enough for compiled mode or if eager EP gets a credible decode path.
